reasoning: Initial observation shows V = 20.0 when I = 2.0 and R = 10.0. To determine the relationship, I will first increase I to observe changes in V.

Increasing I from 2.0 to 3.0 resulted in V increasing from 20.0 to 30.0 while R remained constant at 10.0. This suggests V is directly proportional to I. Next, I will increase R to see if it affects V.

Increasing R from 10.0 to 20.0 while keeping I constant at 3.0 resulted in V increasing from 30.0 to 60.0. This indicates that V is also directly proportional to R. Given these observations, V appears to be the product of I and R.
